title: License Requirements
description: Lobby cities to require licenses or higher regulatory barriers that you have funds to pay for but rivals do not. Create artificial barriers to entry that disadvantage smaller or less-capitalized competitors.
definition-of-done: License lobbying action. Licenses require capital to obtain. Rivals blocked if they lack funds. License costs and requirements visible.
testing-plan: Verify license lobbying works. Test capital requirements. Verify rival blocking. Test license visibility.
